message:
Continue SQLite storage migration from rusqlite to fsqlite

Major refactor of src/storage/sqlite.rs (+282/-245 lines) to complete
the migration from the rusqlite Connection/Transaction API to the
fsqlite Connection API:

- Replace all rusqlite-style parameterized queries with fsqlite's
  execute_with_params and SqliteValue-based parameter binding
- Convert row access from rusqlite's typed row.get() to fsqlite's
  row.get(N).and_then(|v| v.as_text()/as_integer()) pattern
- Update transaction management to use explicit BEGIN/COMMIT
  statements on the connection rather than rusqlite Transaction objects
- Adjust all query result iteration for fsqlite's row iteration API

Co-Authored-By: Claude Opus 4.6 <noreply@anthropic.com>
